note: Reference manifest for Alfred tools and MCP stack. setup.ps1 reads requirements/python-requirements.txt and requirements/npm-tools.txt directly; keep this file in sync when adding tools via learning mode.

packages.description: Power BI CLI for Claude Code
packages.purpose: Connect pbi-cli to an open Power BI Desktop instance. Run 'pbi connect' with Desktop open, then use Power BI MCP for model editing.
Show a desktop notification when a long Claude Code task completes.
Create and edit DOCX reports, proposals, briefs, and templates.
Create PPTX slide decks from analysis, outlines, data, and screenshots.
Extract, inspect, split, merge, and compare PDF content.
Read and write XLSX files when Excel is not open or live MCP is not needed.
Clean, reshape, join, summarize, and export tabular data for Excel, Power BI, and reports.
Two-way live Excel automation via COM — run Python from Excel buttons/macros, install add-in, call Python functions as Excel formulas. Complements excellm MCP for deeper automation.
Convert .xlsx to CSV (in2csv), run SQL on Excel files without opening them (csvsql), instant column stats (csvstat), join and slice CSV exports. Pairs with DuckDB for fast finance data queries.
Open, inspect, filter, reshape, and export Excel/CSV/JSON/Parquet files in the terminal without needing Excel open. Fast exploration before committing to a full script.

cli.note: System CLIs — all install without admin rights. gh uses portable ZIP (Alfred\bin\gh.exe), az via pip, jq and pandoc via winget (no elevation). setup.ps1 handles all of these automatically.

tools.name: gh
tools.install: portable ZIP — setup.ps1 downloads to Alfred\bin\gh.exe (no admin)
tools.purpose: Create PRs, manage issues, view CI run status, create releases, clone repos. Complements GitHub MCP — MCP for Alfred-driven automation, gh for interactive terminal and scripted workflows.

tools.name: jq
tools.purpose: Parse, filter, transform JSON from API responses, config files, Power BI REST API output. Essential when Alfred processes raw JSON in bash pipelines.

tools.name: pandoc
tools.purpose: Convert between markdown, docx, PDF, HTML, pptx. Alfred can draft content in markdown then export to Word or PDF without python-docx for simpler document jobs.

tools.name: az
tools.install: pip install azure-cli (no admin — installs into Alfred's venv)
tools.purpose: Manage Azure resources — Power BI Service REST API, dataflow refresh status, workspace and dataset access, service principal management. Authenticates via existing Maersk Microsoft login.
Primary execution engine for EXECUTE and POWERBI routing. Also the MCP runtime host for Excel, Power BI, GitHub, and Playwright MCPs.
Primary coding engine for CODE routing: implement, refactor, test, and review repository work.
Compress file reads and shell output, session memory, ctx_* MCP tools. Wired via lean-ctx bootstrap after Alfred MCP provision. No API keys required.

tools.name: powerbi-modeling-mcp
tools.purpose: Edit live Power BI Desktop data models — measures, columns, tables, relationships, DAX queries, hierarchies, security roles, partitions, perspectives, translations, calculation groups

tools.name: excel
tools.purpose: Read/write live open Excel workbooks — cells, ranges, sheets, pivot tables, charts, tables, VBA, sorting, formatting

tools.name: github
tools.purpose: GitHub operations — create PRs, manage issues, search repos, review diffs, push files, manage branches

tools.name: playwright
tools.purpose: Browser automation — navigate pages, click, fill forms, scrape data, take screenshots (Chromium)

tools.name: fetch
tools.purpose: Clean web page fetching and HTML-to-Markdown conversion for docs and research

tools.name: filesystem
tools.purpose: Scoped read/write file access — configured for OneDrive finance folder and Alfred project

tools.name: memory
tools.purpose: Persistent knowledge graph for entities, relationships, and facts across sessions

tools.name: sequential-thinking
tools.purpose: Structured multi-step reasoning for complex Power BI, Office, and PC operator tasks

tools.name: time
tools.purpose: Time and timezone conversion for scheduling and automation context

tools.name: sqlite
tools.purpose: Local SQLite database — create, query, and analyse structured data without a server

tools.name: duckdb
tools.purpose: Fast SQL analytics on CSV, Excel exports, and Parquet files — query raw data without loading into Excel

tools.name: lean-ctx
tools.purpose: Context OS — compress reads/shell output, session memory, 76 ctx_* MCP tools. Merged after Alfred MCPs via Provision-Cursor.ps1. No API keys.
tools.notes: Complements Alfred domain MCPs; does not replace Power BI / Excel / GitHub.

tools.name: ms365
tools.purpose: 200+ Microsoft 365 tools — Outlook email+calendar, Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive, Word, Excel via Graph API
tools.requiresKey: Microsoft Graph API (Azure AD app registration)
tools.keySource: https://entra.microsoft.com — requires Azure app with Mail/Calendar/Files scopes

tools.name: git
tools.purpose: Structured repository inspection, history, and diffs via MCP (vs direct bash git)
tools.notes: Useful when targeting a specific repo. Bash git is already pre-approved as fallback.
